svg.title: CreateRootNode Full Detail
svg.text: EWAdapterC::CreateRootNode Full Flow
在鸿蒙创建根 ArkUI 节点（Stack + XComponent）并与 SDL 窗口绑定 | SDL_AdapterC.cpp
CreateRootNode(NodeAttribute *nodeParams, bool scale)
Init() 时已记录主线程 / mainJsThreadId was saved at Init()
EWAdapterC::Init: mainJsThreadId = std::this_thread::get_id() // 记录注册 NAPI 时所在的线程，即 JS 主线程
curThreadId ==
mainJsThreadId ?
Y / 是
N / 否
在主线程 / On JS main thread
当前线程就是 JS 主线程
无需跨线程，可直接操作 ArkUI nodeAPI
res = CreateEWNode(nullptr, nodeParams, scale);
准备参数 + 同步锁 / Prepare params + sync lock
auto lockInfo = std::make_shared<ThreadLockInfo>();
WorkParam *workParam = new WorkParam(nullptr, nullptr, nodeParams, scale, lockInfo);
// ThreadLockInfo: mutex + condition_variable + bool ready
定义异步回调 / Define after-work callback
uv_after_work_cb afterFunc = [](uv_work_t *work, int _status) {
WorkParam *p = (WorkParam*)(work->data);
p->replyNode = CreateEWNode(nullptr, p->nodeParams, p->boolStatus);
// 在 JS 线程上执行; p->lockInfo->ready=true; notify_all(); }
GetThreadWorkResult (SDL_AdapterC.cpp:67)
napi_get_uv_event_loop(EWAdapterC::MainEnv, &loop);
uv_work_t *work = new uv_work_t; work->data = workParam;
uv_work_cb uvWork = [](uv_work_t*){}; // 线程池 worker 为空
uv_queue_work(loop, work, uvWork, afterFunc); // 将 afterFunc 排进 JS/uv loop
SDL 线程阻塞等待 / SDL Thread BLOCKS
std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(workParam->lockInfo->mutex);
workParam->lockInfo->condition.wait(lock, [&]{return lockInfo->ready;});
// 阻塞直到 afterFunc 设置 ready=true 并调用 notify_all()
SDL 线程唤醒 + 获取结果 / Unblocks + get result
res = workParam->replyNode; delete workParam;
两路汇并 / Both paths converge: return res
CreateEWNode(parentNode, nodeParams, scale) --- SDL_AdapterC.cpp:284
// 两个路径最终都会调用此函数，在 JS 主线程上执行
Step 1 计算 Z 层次 / Compute Z-index
int32_t curZIndex = GetNodeZIndex(parentNode) + 1; // parentNode==nullptr -> GetNodeZIndex returns 0
Step 2 创建 STACK 容器 / Create STACK container
ArkUI_NodeHandle stack = nodeAPI->createNode(ARKUI_NODE_STACK);
// 如果 stack==nullptr -> return nullptr
stack == nullptr --> return nullptr
Step 3 配置 STACK 属性 / Configure STACK attributes
SetStackSize(stack, nodeParams, scale); // NODE_WIDTH + NODE_HEIGHT (如有 scale 则按 vp 转换)
SetStackAlignContent(stack); // NODE_ALIGN_CONTENT = ARKUI_ALIGNMENT_TOP_START
SetStackZIndex(stack, curZIndex); SetStackPosition(stack, x, y); SetStackHitTestMode(stack);
Step 4 创建 XComponent 节点 / Create XComponent node
ArkUI_NodeHandle xc = nodeAPI->createNode(ARKUI_NODE_XCOMPONENT);
// xc==nullptr -> disposeNode(stack); return nullptr
xc==nullptr --> disposeNode(stack); return nullptr
Step 5 配置 XComponent 属性 / Configure XComponent attributes
SetXCompontId(xc, nodeParams->componentModel->id.c_str()); // 组件 ID 用于 ewNodeMap 对应
SetXCompontType(xc, componentModel->type); SetXCompontFocusable(xc); // 可获焦点
Step 6 构建 Node 结构 / Build Node struct
std::shared_ptr<Node> node = std::make_shared<Node>();
node->nodeType = ARKUI_NODE_XCOMPONENT; node->node = xc; node->container = stack;
SDL_snprintf(node->nodeOwner, sizeof(nodeOwner), "SDL2"); // 标记归属
Step 7 创建 EWNode 包装器 / Create EWNode wrapper
EWNode *ewNode = new EWNode(node, nodeAPI, nodeParams); // 持有 Node、nodeAPI、NodeAttribute
// ewNode==nullptr -> disposeNode(stack, xc); node=nullptr; return nullptr
ewNode==nullptr --> disposeNode(stack,xc); return nullptr
Step 8 将 XComponent 挂载到 STACK / Mount XComponent onto STACK
ewNode->SetZIndex(curZIndex);
nodeAPI->addChild(stack, xc); // STACK 内嵌 XComponent
parentNode
!= nullptr ?
Y/是
挂载到父节点 / Mount onto parent node
nodeAPI->addChild(parentNode->container, stack);
ewNode->SetParent(parentNode);
N/否 (根节点无需挂载)
Step 9 注册到哈希表 / Register to ewNodeMap
ewNodeMap[nodeParams->componentModel->id] = ewNode; // 以 XComponent ID 为键管理所有节点
return node; // shared_ptr<Node> 返回封装结果
返回的 shared_ptr<Node> 包含 {node=xc, container=stack}，即 SDL 窗口对应的 ArkUI 节点对。 ewNodeMap 用于后续所有 Resize/Move/Show/Hide/Raise/Remove 操作。
